notes: Machine-readable index of faion workflows. The faion umbrella SKILL.md auto-routes user intent to one of these by matching `triggers` keywords. Each workflow folder follows the workflow-spec at .aidocs/conventions/workflows/workflow-spec.md.

schema.title: Display title
schema.triggers: List of keyword phrases that should auto-route to this workflow

brainstorm.title: Brainstorm
brainstorm.summary: Multi-agent diverge-converge-review for ideation, technical audits, and improvement plans. Distinct personas in independent generation prevent anchoring; adversarial reviewers prevent rubber-stamping.
brainstorm.notes: Phase 0 CONSENT GATE: if the orchestrator triggered brainstorm but the user did not explicitly request it, MUST AskUserQuestion before launching agents. Defaults: 10 research + 8 reviewers, max 3 parallel, 30 recs/agent.

improver.title: Improver
improver.summary: Session-first continuous improvement. Phase 0 (session review) runs on every invocation and appends PAT/ERR/DEC entries to .aidocs/memory/. Phases 1-7 are optional extensions.
improver.notes: Phase 0 always runs first. Phase 3.5 is mandatory before any write — even CRITICAL findings cannot bypass user approval. Phase 4b routes project-scope findings through SDD planning.

media-ops.title: Media-Ops
media-ops.summary: Build a complete AI media publishing pipeline from scratch (TG channel + site + automation). 7 phases: discovery interview, propose format, scaffold project, setup infrastructure, seed content, register in media-manager, iterate. Pattern proven in 4 production outlets.
media-ops.notes: Reference impls: neromedia (8 langs), pashtelka (UA), longlife (UA), ender (UA+EN). Cron lives centrally in media-manager — never schedule per-outlet. Image-required rule: no TG post without an image.

poll-agents.title: Poll-Agents
poll-agents.summary: Self-replenishing pool of N background subagents draining a queue of independent task batches. Parent does only orchestration; all writes happen in isolated worktree subagents. Two-signal replenishment: cron tick + completion handler.
poll-agents.notes: Hard rule: parent does NOT do research/writes/commits/merges. Strict 15-in-flight cap default. State: QUEUE.txt + DONE.txt + optional ACTIVE.txt. On batch failure, retry-with-sonnet (not haiku). Battle-tested at feature-045 (1142 methodologies) and feature-048 (120 playbooks).

sdd-batch-orchestrator.title: SDD Batch Orchestrator
sdd-batch-orchestrator.summary: Orchestration pattern for delivering a batch of related SDD features end-to-end inside one Claude Code session: study .aidocs/ features → clarify → plan → wave-execute in worktrees → verify → review → fix → visual-deliver → close.
sdd-batch-orchestrator.notes: Also fits single-feature SDD work (smaller scope, same phases). Primary execution path for feature-048 (120 tier playbooks). decisions.xml covers phase-count, versioned prompt files, worktree-isolated waves, flock-serialized merge, hard-capped review-fix loop, visual-deliver phase, per-surface playbook adaptation.
